case_title: NICHOLAS RONALDS ET AL VS. RUTH BENDER

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF RONALDS, NICHOLAS BYER, MARY JANE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-15-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT BENDER, RUTH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2022 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (CURRENT HEARING: 7/8/22 AT 10:00AM) (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT BENDER, RUTH
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,667.08 FILED BY RONALDS, NICHOLAS BYER, MARY JANE AS TO DEFENDANT BENDER, RUTH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(PLANTIFFS)**GRANTED**
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $105.75) SERVED JUN-03-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BENDER, RUTH
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT BENDER, RUTH
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(DEFENDANT)**GRANTED**
REMARK: PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RECEIVED, VIA US EXPRESS MAIL, FOR 7/15/22 AT 10 AM
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF RONALDS, NICHOLAS BYER, MARY JANE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-15-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-15-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF NICHOLAS RONALDS IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF MARY JANE BYERS IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT RUIS IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. OTHER APPEARANCE: PLAINTIFF WITNESS KATHEEN RONALDS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: DEFENDANT EXHIBIT RECEIVED, VIA FEDEX MAIL, FOR 7/15/22 HEARING AT 10 AM (FORWARDED TO DEPT 506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RONALDS, NICHOLAS BYER, MARY JANE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENDER, RUTH $2,117.21 PRINCIPAL, $155.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,272.96, PLAINTIFF IS RESPONSIBLE FOR DEDUCTIONS THEY ACKNOWLEDGE IN ADDITION TO CLEANING COSTS FOR THE DOG HAIR AND HOOK/FRIDGE REPAIRS. TENANTS ARE NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR LOCKSMITH CHARGES; LATE FEES AND VITAMIX BLENDER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BENDER, RUTH
